body:
Add specification of relaxation timescales as ClimaParams for gcmdriven SCM setup. Supersedes #3364.

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **New Features**
  - Enhanced external forcing capabilities with new functionality for eddy vertical fluctuations and improved relaxation timescale computations.
  - Added configuration options to customize momentum and scalar relaxation timescales and set height constraints.
  - Introduced new fields for external forcing parameters in climate model structures.
  
- **Documentation**
  - Updated help text for the external forcing file to provide clearer guidance for GCM-driven setups.

- **Bug Fixes**
  - Corrected a typographical error in dependency update messaging.

- **Chores**
  - Performed routine dependency updates to ensure system compatibility.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
title: Add relaxation timescale for deep convection in gcmdriven SCM setup
